response.overview: A pioneering documentary exploring Ehlers-Danlos syndrome, Exhausted Existence: An EDS Story follows four journeys. Each person manages their Ehlers-Danlos syndrome in different ways. This documentary aims to shine a light on a community that deserves recognition for its perseverance through unique challenges in life and, in many cases, thriving despite the significant complications presented by this syndrome.
response.title: Exhausted Existence: An EDS Story
